title: Bear Wolf attacks first during battle

card.rawText: This creature always attacks first during battle.

plan.title: Bear Wolf attacks first during battle
plan.summary: Battle Bear Wolf into a faster defender and verify Bear Wolf still takes the first attack.

notes: Place Bear Wolf on player_1 field as primary.
Use a faster defender so always-attacks-first must override Speed comparison.

steps: Start battle with Bear Wolf against a faster defender.
Verify Bear Wolf is the first attacker.

expectedAssertions.label: Bear Wolf attacks first despite lower Speed

manualVerification: Verify against card text: This creature always attacks first during battle.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the headless expected-success route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_015_bear_wolf-015-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
